todos.content: Resolve current OpenAI guidance and live API credential
todos.description: Use official current Agents SDK/model guidance and confirm the server can receive OPENAI_API_KEY without exposing it.

todos.content: Build Launch Desk backend and agent tools
todos.description: Create the FastAPI streaming route, Agents SDK setup, tool modules, schemas, and error handling.

todos.content: Build the polished Launch Desk frontend
todos.description: Create the form, progressive event UI, responsive result workspace, and accessible states.

todos.content: Add tests, README, and validation checklist
todos.description: Cover tool behavior and stream serialization, document setup and extension paths, and add the requested checklist.
Run unit/static checks plus the repository modularity and route import gates as applicable.

todos.content: Verify a real end-to-end streamed launch plan
todos.description: Run backend and frontend outside network isolation and confirm one tool event and one model text delta via the local API and UI flow.
Fetch the requested remote branch, verify it does not track .xo, and create/switch to the local tracking branch without disturbing user work.

todos.content: Build a simple Agent SDK hello-world app
todos.description: Next requested phase after branch and project startup; confirm the exact UI shape before implementation if the target branch does not make it obvious.
todos.active_form: Building the Agent SDK hello-world app

todos.content: Start and verify the existing project
todos.description: Use the target branch startup instructions and verify the local application responds.

todos.content: Map the complete /space UI and data flows
todos.description: Inspect the live UI and trace every view, endpoint, calculation, source file, refresh loop, and fallback.

todos.content: Write and verify the /space one-page brief
todos.description: Document product utility, architecture, implemented features, conditions, and extension seams with source evidence.

todos.content: Test and verify the multi-source Sessions flow
todos.description: Add regression tests, run modularity and import gates, restart the server, and verify combined and isolated source views end to end in the browser.

todos.content: Add independent Claude Code and Codex source toggles
todos.description: Render accessible checked-by-default controls and recalculate every Sessions subview from the enabled source set.

todos.content: Add Codex session telemetry to the Sessions data pipeline
todos.description: Parse local Codex session metadata, usage, models, and tools; merge it with the existing Claude telemetry while preserving the response contract and modularity rules.
